caption: A man with glasses, wearing a white long-sleeved shirt and a black vest, stands before a microphone in a room with wood-paneled walls. He is speaking or singing, with his hand moving toward his chest. In the foreground, several people are seen from behind, including individuals with blonde, brown, and white hair, facing the man. A microphone on a stand is positioned in front of him. The logo "ORCA" appears in a white box on the right side of the scene. As the sequence progresses, the man's facial expression changes slightly, and he maintains his position behind the microphone while the audience remains still. The lighting is consistent across the scenes, and the composition remains steady, focusing on the man as the central figure addressing the gathered group.
